forbiddenModifications: Do not use Tailwind arbitrary values

Do not add CSS properties that are not in criticalSelectors or in elements[].styles (or element states)
Do not reorder children: follow contentOrder and elements[].children order exactly

.tabstrip__container.description: Visible tabs first, then Add Tab button (when showAddTab), then More dropdown (when showMore and overflowTabs.length > 0). Do not reorder.

patterns.tabstrip-delegation: ShellFooter wraps TabStrip and passes tabs, showAddTab, overflowMode, and overflowTabs. When showMore is true and overflowTabs has items, overflowMode is manual; otherwise none. Active tabs display a pin icon.
patterns.variant-height: The variant prop controls height: default uses --shell-footer-height-default, compact uses --shell-footer-height-compact.

defaultContent._contentOrderDescription: Inside TabStrip container: visible tabs first, then Add Tab button (when showAddTab), then More dropdown (when showMore and overflowTabs.length > 0). Do not reorder.
defaultContent._propsDescription: showMore: show More dropdown; moreCount: number for More (N) label; overflowTabs: tabs shown in More dropdown when showMore is true; showAddTab: show Add Tab button; variant: default | compact (height). When showMore and overflowTabs have items, overflowMode is manual; otherwise none.
defaultContent._behavior: Footer does not scroll; overflow is driven by container/browser width.

events.name: click
events.description: Clicks on footer links or actions

examples.name: Standard with sidebars
examples.description: Full layout with left and right sidebars

examples.name: Standard minimal
examples.description: Minimal layout with header and footer only

examples.description: Footer with tab strip and add-tab button
